CREATE TABLE businessService (serviceID INT PRIMARY KEY, serviceName VARCHAR(255), serviceDetails TEXT);
INSERT INTO businessService (serviceID, serviceName, serviceDetails) VALUES (1, 'Service A', 'Details about Service A');
INSERT INTO businessService (serviceID, serviceName, serviceDetails) VALUES (2, 'Service B', 'Details about Service B');
INSERT INTO businessService (serviceID, serviceName, serviceDetails) VALUES (3, 'Service C', 'Details about Service C');
SELECT serviceName, (SELECT serviceDetails FROM businessService WHERE serviceID = 2) AS serviceDetailsForServiceB FROM businessService WHERE serviceID = 1;
SELECT b1.serviceName AS ServiceAName, b2.serviceDetails AS ServiceBDetails FROM businessService b1 JOIN businessService b2 ON b1.serviceID = 1 AND b2.serviceID = 2;
SELECT b1.serviceName, COUNT(b2.serviceID) FROM businessService b1 LEFT JOIN businessService b2 ON b1.serviceID = b2.serviceID GROUP BY b1.serviceName;
SELECT * FROM businessService WHERE serviceName LIKE '%Service%' AND serviceID IN (SELECT serviceID FROM businessService WHERE serviceID > 1);
SELECT serviceID, serviceName FROM businessService WHERE serviceID IN (SELECT serviceID FROM businessService WHERE serviceDetails LIKE '%Details%') ORDER BY serviceName ASC;
